title: Well This is Embarassing…
excerpt: After being out of town (for what seems like months) for work, a funeral, and a wedding, I am finally home for a while. No plane rides for the rest of the month of November. It's a miracle. The only…
body:
After being out of town (for what seems like months) for work, a funeral, and a wedding, I am finally home for a while. No plane rides for the rest of the month of November. It's a miracle. The only problem with being home is that I am in the midst of a few deadlines and my desk is an absolute disaster.

See? Now I am just hoping for a small miracle so I can get a lot of work done. Be back tomorrow with a fun giveaway.
